commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=bd9e0e33c1a115aac9328c8b234b42400b7875b6)
commands.review_summary:
Raises the Skill Workshop proposal description cap from 160 to 500 bytes, removes the agent tool schema maxLength precheck, and updates service tests plus prompt/docs copy.

PR surface: Source -1, Tests 0, Docs 0. Total -1 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main validates tool arguments before execution and still has both the 160-byte service cap and 160-character tool schema precheck. I did not run a live webchat/tool invocation in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review remains because contributor real behavior proof and maintainer contract acceptance are not automation-repairable, even though the docs wording fix is small.

target.title: skill_workshop: increase or make configurable the 160-byte description limit
target.body:
## Summary

Raise the Skill Workshop proposal description byte limit from 160 to 500 and remove the agent tool schema `maxLength` precheck so oversized descriptions reach the service layer and return its friendly error message.

## Root Cause

The `skill_workshop` tool had a TypeBox `maxLength: 160` constraint on the description parameter. When the agent sent a description over 160 bytes, TypeBox rejected it at schema validation before the service could return its own friendly error. Both the limit (too low) and the precheck (bypasses the service layer) needed fixing.

## Real behavior proof

### behavior
- Raised service-level cap from 160 to 500 bytes (`MAX_SKILL_PROPOSAL_DESCRIPTION_BYTES = 500`)
- Removed TypeBox `maxLength` on tool description parameter so validation now happens at the service layer
- Updated all prompt/docs references (7 surfaces) from 160 to 500

### environment
- OS: Linux
- Runtime: Node.js 22
- Setup: OpenClaw PR branch at bd9e0e33

### steps
1. Service test: call `proposeCreateSkill` with 501-byte description → rejected with `"Skill description is too large"` (friendly service error, not schema error)
2. Service test: call with 300-byte description → accepted
3. Tool schema: verify no `maxLength` constraint on description field (delegates to service)

### observedResult

**Service validation tests (25/25 passed):**
```
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  25 passed (25)
```

Key tests:
- 501-byte description (create) → `"proposal description is too large"` via service ✓
- 501-byte description (revise) → `"proposal description is too large"` via service ✓  
- 300-byte description → accepted ✓
- Derived description update ≤ 500 bytes ✓
- Supplied short description → accepted ✓

**Production changes:**

1. Service cap (`src/skills/workshop/constants.ts`):
```diff
-export const MAX_SKILL_PROPOSAL_DESCRIPTION_BYTES = 160;
+export const MAX_SKILL_PROPOSAL_DESCRIPTION_BYTES = 500;
```

2. Tool schema (`src/agents/tools/skill-workshop-tool.ts`):
```diff
 description: Type.Optional(
   Type.String({
-    maxLength: 500,
     description:
-      "Skill description for action=create, action=update, or action=revise. Keep it concise; max 500 bytes.",
+      "Skill description for action=create, action=update, or action=revise. Keep it concise; the service enforces a byte limit.",
   }),
 ),
```

## Regression Test Plan

- [x] `pnpm test --run src/skills/workshop/service.test.ts` — 25/25 passed
- [x] `pnpm test --run src/agents/system-prompt.test.ts` — 88/88 passed  
- [x] Schema no longer rejects descriptions at tool call layer — service handles validation
- [x] All 7 doc/prompt surfaces updated to 500 bytes
target.author: lzyyzznl

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge

commands.author: lzyyzznl
